name: basecamp

scripts.test:integration: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-test --only firestore,auth 'vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.js'
scripts.deploy:checks: npm ci && npm test && npm run test:integration
scripts.deploy:dev: node scripts/check-dev-env.mjs && npm run deploy:checks && npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project dev
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/check-prod-env.mjs && npm run deploy:checks && npm run build:prod && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes --project prod
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use deploy:dev or deploy:prod explicitly' && exit 1

_overridesNote: protobufjs pinned to 7.6.3 to fix GHSA-f38q-mgvj-vph7 / CVE-2026-54269 (see issue #86), since firebase@12.14.0 (latest stable as of 2026-06-16) still resolves protobufjs@7.6.2 transitively via @grpc/proto-loader. Remove this override once a stable firebase release transitively pulls protobufjs>=7.6.3 - check with `npm ls protobufjs` after bumping firebase.
